creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Lorenzo Salvadore from comment #3)
Apologies for that, I will try to be less impatient in the future.

I don't expect any problems from these fixes, as they are really quite trivial. I will submit them upstream but I have no high hopes, since my previous fixes in a similar area are still languishing in gcc's bug tracker. :/
